sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: Until the spell ends, sleet falls...
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime duration and concentration are represented.
sleet-storm.issue: The ordinary spell duration is represented; the missing mechanics are area triggers and environmental effects.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional ending field required for this row.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: No duration runtime change required for this row.

slow.canonicalEvidence: Up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot Cube within range.
slow.structuredState: Targeting Type: multi; Targeting Max: 6; Area Shape: cube.
slow.jsonState: Runtime targeting is multi, maxTargets 6, area Cube 40.
slow.issue: The up-to-six choice and cube targeting are represented.
slow.recommendedTemplateChange: No target-count change required for this row.

slow.canonicalEvidence: The target Speed is halved, it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can make only one attack if it takes the Attack action.
slow.structuredState: Effect Type: DEBUFF; Save Stat: Wisdom; no typed speed, AC, Dexterity-save, or attack limit fields.
slow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has prose utility only.
slow.issue: Slow has multiple debuffs that are not typed: speed halving, AC penalty, Dexterity save penalty, and one-attack limit.
slow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement multiplier, AC penalty, save penalty, and action/attack limit fields.
slow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime slowDebuff data for speed x0.5, AC -2, Dexterity saves -2, one attack only.

slow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no reaction restriction.
slow.issue: Slow blocks all reactions, but this is prose-only.

slow.canonicalEvidence: An affected target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.
slow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no repeat save.
slow.issue: Slow has an end-turn repeat Wisdom save ending the effect per target.
slow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatSave turn_end Wisdom successEnds true.
slow.closedReason: Slow now records the end-turn Wisdom repeat save as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data.

slow.canonicalEvidence: It takes a -2 penalty to AC.
slow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no AC penalty data.
slow.issue: The detector matched AC, but the real mechanic is a creature defensive-stat penalty, not object damageability.
slow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add AC penalty under defensive/stat modifier fields, not object stats.
slow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime AC penalty -2 in a debuff/stat modifier model.

slow.canonicalEvidence: If it casts a spell with a Somatic component, there is a 25 percent chance the spell fails.
slow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no spell failure chance.
slow.issue: Slow imposes a 25 percent failure chance on spells with Somatic components.
slow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add component-gated spell failure chance fields.
slow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellcastFailureChance 25 percent when spell has Somatic component.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: You grant the semblance of life to a corpse of your choice within range, allowing it to answer questions you pose.
speak-with-dead.structuredState: Valid Targets: corpse; no question count fields.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime targeting allows creatures and has only prose utility.
speak-with-dead.issue: The corpse target and up-to-five questions are not represented as runtime data.
speak-with-dead.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse target and question-count fields.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime corpse target filter and maxQuestions 5.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: Until the spell ends, you can ask the corpse up to five questions. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, including the languages it knew.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
speak-with-dead.issue: Speak with Dead enables limited Q&A with language/knowledge constraints, but none are typed.
speak-with-dead.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse communication fields for max questions, answer constraints, and known languages.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data maxQuestions 5, answersFromLifeKnowledgeOnly, languagesKnownInLife.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: This spell does not return the creature soul to its body, only its animating spirit.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no typed state for animating spirit without soul.
speak-with-dead.issue: The animating-spirit distinction limits what the corpse can know and do, but is prose-only.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime corpseState animatingSpiritOnly and soulNotReturned.
